We have a triple product formula: . Replace these vectors with and . We have to explain the . In this term you should not regard as a common vector and this is not a common numerical product. Instead, is an operator acting on scalar . With the operator understanding, it will be easy to interpret why it becomes a gradient operator instead of a common product.
